content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems can be augmented by repurposing the intrinsic reward signal from curiosity-driven methods (ICM/RND) to prioritize which episodic memories get retained and consolidated, rather than just using uncertainty sampling to select new data points for labeling. This creates a 'curiosity-driven memory pruning' pipeline where the agent only retains high-surprise, high-learning-potential memories that align with its active learning goals.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
